title: Output-Based Pricing System Proceeds Fund: Decarbonization Incentive Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Output-Based Pricing System Proceeds Fund: Decarbonization Incentive Program
The Decarbonization Incentive Program (DIP) is a merit-based program. It is funded by proceeds collected from the Output-Based Pricing System (OBPS) . DIP’s objectives are to encourage long-term decarbonization of Canada’s industrial sectors. It also supports Canada’s greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduction goals.
The program funds single or multi-year projects. The goal of these projects is to advance the use of existing and/or proven low-carbon technologies and processes.
These projects will further reduce GHG emissions within the eligible provinces. These are Saskatchewan Manitoba, Ontario, and New Brunswick.
For the amount of funds allocated to each eligible province: Output-Based Pricing System Proceeds Fund
The program is closed for applications. Thank you for your interest in the Decarbonization Incentive Program.
If you have questions on the Decarbonization Incentive Program, please contact us by email at fonds-stfr.obps-fund@ec.gc.ca .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
